UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0670_CU_BATHING (M0670) Current Bathing Current ability to wash entire body. 00 = Able to bathe self in shower or tub independently
01 = With the use of devices, is able to bathe self in shower or tub independently
02 = Able to bathe in shower or tub with the assistance of another person:
